title: cynometra cuneata
intro: Cynometra cuneata, also known as the Cuneate Ironwood, is a plant species in the family Fabaceae, native to tropical Africa. The plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects, making it useful in treating various health issues such as fever, diarrhea, and respiratory infections. The health benefits of Cynometra cuneata include its ability to reduce inflammation, improve digestion, and boost the immune system. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used to make teas, infusions, and decoctions, which can be consumed to reap its medicinal benefits.
